# Milk - reduced fat grass fed*Created: Monday, May 14, 2018 at 3:33:31?PM*<ul>
<li>Milk - reduced fat grass fed </li>
<li>Coffee blue Nile - grind whole bag extra fine </li>
<li>Agave </li>
<li>Blackberries (4 boxes)</li>
<li>Blueberries (3 boxes)</li>
<li>Organic Apple juice </li>
</ul>
